Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SEDINA BANKS, Esq. of Greenberg Glusker Fields Claman & Machtinger LLP (tel; 310-553-3610) for Defendant SM Beaty.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.
